original_abstract: Physicochemical assessments demonstrate that GP2013 maintains a high degree of similarity to originator rituximab, particularly regarding primary and higher-order architecture, post-translational modifications, and size-related variants. Furthermore, an extensive functional characterization confirms that GP2013 preserves the same essential biological properties as the reference product.
humanized_abstract: An assessment of the physicochemical characteristics of GP2013 showed that it was highly similar to the benchmark comparator rituximab in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications, as well as size heterogeneity. An extensive functional characterization was also performed to determine that GP2013 possesses biological activity that is essentially indistinguishable from that of the benchmark comparator.
